reviews.review_title: $20 A MONTH JUST TO IMPORT GLB
reviews.review_description: disgusting end stage capitalism type shh, $20 a month?!?! are you absolutely kidding me???????? taking GLB imports from the free version??? such a disgrace, shame on ALL of you involved in that decision. Money hungry, disingenuous, disgusting vultures
Any usefulness this software has is overshadowed by its scummy business practices such as requiring an account and the monthly subscription paywall XD

I used this app a few years ago, and it was very limited. Idk if it was just me getting older or what, but this app has become much better! I really enjoy the material menu and new tools, because they give me more creative freedom. 10/10!

reviews.review_title: Yea so i got this game
reviews.review_description: Ummmm. Idk by i got this I'm not creative. FIVE STARS FROM ME
Yes, fun for artists and designers alike. Only recommendation would be to allow direct downloading from rooms on the website to computer instead of having to export it to the cloud first

It is the easiest way to start creating 3D models that you can even export to
Other apps like blender or unity.

reviews.review_title: Free and very good but i can't...
reviews.review_description: ....export files in local storage for import files to other apps (If i'm wrong someone let me know).
You can model a lot and anything build with friends

reviews.review_title: Update keep on making the app freeze
reviews.review_description: I did the updated on this app on my meta quest 2, since I’ve done this, the app keep freezing for some reason and it’s as smooth when your sketch before the updated. Overall the app is excellent, I just need to sort out these issues
It is really easy to yes for beginners and pros ther is a left handed mode I love this game it is useful you can use it for Design or just for fun

Not only for conceptual sketches - this environment allows for surprisingly efficient collaborations on ideas, spatial objects, 3D designs, ART.
I was working mostly in that last space - facilitating stationary and online group workshops and courses of this great app.
If you are bored this is suggested of you ￼￼
Best paint game 10/10

I initially came across Vroid, then learned about Blender/Unity wanting to import them into VRChat. I have weapon prop ideas, and this is just so brilliant. I also have a Sketchbook app on my phone, where I can instantly upload quick reference pictures to the LandingPad website to bring into Gravity sketch. You have options to export models into files. I generally export in OBJ, so I can bring models into blender. I came close to making my own rigged armature in Blender with a character I made in Gravity sketch. Right now that character has a VRM and is showcased on the Vroid Hub website. I really appreciate how all of the software meshes together. I find Gravity Sketch easier than Blender.

No eraser just and undo or delete. But mine is stuck in only deleting the most recent strike. So I can’t select an earlier line and delete. Just give me a simple eraser that doesn’t delete the whole action. 

If you want to draw in space just go into the BIG screen app
I think this app is a must get for any quest users and it is really cool and a nice way to release your creativity and the good thing is it is completely FREE ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.review_title: i dont like that changes in licensing
reviews.review_description: I fill myself slightly fooled because of that..
I paid for this app more than 20 € and today it is free without compensation…
I would recommend it if you do not have much experience in building 3d you draw 3d things so yea

I use 3d scanning and traditional CAD in my work flows currently for industrial design, wheels, fenders, linkages, etc. After running through the training, I'm really impressed with Gravity Sketch. I can import existing assemblies, use mixed reality to rough things out, import my 3d scans for some more precision, and then rough in and refine rounded or organic surfaces which are normally a pain in conventional CAD, with a much shorter learning curve than 3d modeling software like blender. I wish there were some more features to utilize mixed reality, which is more passive at that moment. I would pay a lot for this software!

- If you in sanctioned countries - you can't export your models or register an account. You can create them, but not export for further use. 

+ Good for polygonal hard surface modeling, quite rare feature for VR space. That's why it it's a shame that I can't export my work from it.
You can ‘save as’ but if you continue working on a project you already made a save for and try to update that save it doesn’t work and you lose all of your progress
Realy bad
The materials were confusing and hard to use. And starting something new took time to figure out. The drawing was pretty good though.

This is a very elegant app. I stumbled across this after just getting my oculus and I haven’t played any games since I found this. 

The fact that you can scale in and out and draw in such detail makes sense that much more entertaining and allows to really get up close and personal with every little piece of your sketch. 

If I could give it 10 stars I would. The future of VR is bright. Keep up the amazing work.

Incredible experience. The design is unusually user friendly. With very little practice the user feels confident. The haptic feedback is delightfully subtle. Feels like designing with one own bare hands.

reviews.review_title: It doesn't even let me in the  game.
reviews.review_description: Every time I play it crashes after 45 seconds.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for sharing this with the team. We recommend people delete the app and reinstall it if they are having issues like this. If that doesn't fix the problem, please get in touch with our team by emailing support@gravitysketch.com and we'd love to help you out.

reviews.review_description: As a casual user, I'm amazed at what I can do. The whole expérience is just clever. For the pros, I can only imagine the possibilities.. Thank you! Im inspired to learn.
Excellent app for 3d sketch & 3d sketch practice. Tho, I hope that someone may be able to add detailed light effects art-tools and light effects general tools in-sketch-room.
It absolutely sucks don’t buy it I know it does it cost money but it’s horrible
So bad
All I get is a black screen. Game doesn't load😑 All the other games work. Guess I'll uninstall it.

developer_response.body: Hi there, sorry to hear this happened to you. It's tricky to diagnose what may have caused this without asking for a few more details, but I would suggest uninstalling the app and then downloading it again as a first step to resolving this. It may be down to the software version you have on your headset, so make sure you have the most recent version on your headset too. If you're still struggling, you can always speak directly to the team by emailing support@gravitysketch.com.

reviews.review_description: Do not give this game.
I love using this app even though I’ve only had it for a couple of hours it’s like having tony starks tech in real life

reviews.review_title: Love this with all my Art
reviews.review_description: Rediscovered a love for doodling.Amazjng art tool for all ages
There are still not enough functions for drawing drafts.

I started using this app a couple of weeks ago and the learning curve was minimal. The ability to create/design with immediate results and such direct control is a surreal experience. I would love to see where this toolset goes as it matures. One feature I would love to see is hand controls/gestures in lieu of the touch controllers. Also hope there is a 2D desktop interface for PC at some point. Thank you to the developers for making this free!

I have nothing wrong with this app except for that fact that it’s so hard to use. It took me about 1.5
 hours to figure out how to do stuff but once you get the hang of it, it’s great. I love it. 100% recommend  to people thinking about getting the game.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review, and thank you for persevering in figuring out how to use the app! In case you haven't found them yet, there are a number of tutorials available in app (the mortar board icon in the menu when inside a sketch). There is more on our YouTube channel as well that will hopefully help you get up to speed - we have some tutorial videos on there as well as live sketch sessions every week. There are some really great tutorials from the community on YouTube as well. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_title: Just got it. So far can be useful
reviews.review_description:
When I got this I was hoping to be able to channel my more artistic talents. Sadly the tools and features arnt much for art than other things. It’s still great for being free.

When I was trying to make the account for the landing pad thing and it kept saying I did it wrong and wouldn’t let me in even though I triple checked it. 

The multiple features can be very confusing and a little hard to operate but I think I got the hang of it. 

You can’t sculpt much and there’s no erasing feature. I have multiple ideas that I can come back and add to the review when use the app more. 

Any ways. If your looking for something to be artistic with. This won’t be the best fit. If your looking to create something new, use for business, stuff like that. This is great for you

Appreciate how easy it is to learn due to the tutorials in the app. I am getting some glitches when trying more complex sculpting but other than that very good. 
I was pretty sad to buy the app and see 5 a days later it would be made free, why wasn’t there something on the store making me aware of this before I paid the money? 
I would get the refund and wait for the app to download for free but then I wont be able to use it for a week other than that I’d say The app itself is a must use for creatives *****
What an incredible app. I honestly can’t focus and make something good with this app because I have so much fun just doodling in 3D! Such a good time!
Very nice game but I had some trouble using it but I'm pretty sure it was that I need some more practice

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for your review! To help you get started, there are some in-app tutorial videos (click on the graduation cap in the menu when you are in a sketch), or check out our YouTube channel where a number of additional tutorials are available!

reviews.review_description: Beans wut
I’m new to VR, but of all of the games and entertainment apps, yours is the most fun.  I can see true creatives doing mind blowing projects with this.

I bought the Quest 2 for tilt-brush and the gimmick factor. Then I found Gravity sketch on discount and bought it on a whim. I'm so glad I did it! I will get tilt brush eventually but gravity sketch could have been a reason to buy VR on its own and I would had missed it had I bought Tilt-brush first. It's a serious creativity tool. I love both freehand sketching with it and hard-surface modelling. And it's so snappy! I've already reached 1.2M polys and counting, doesn't seem to be slowing down. And the battery seems to be draining slowly! Wonder what's Quest's polygon limit!

Oh yeah, one more thing: This program has a learning curve. Many functions are hidden away from the interface so you can't get away without studying it at all.

developer_response.body:
Great to hear that you're enjoying using Gravity Sketch and thanks for picking it up!

We spend a lot of time thinking about how to make all the features as easily accessible as possible whilst also making sure the interface doesn't get in the way of the intuitive sketching and modeling flow, so we always appreciate thoughts and feedback on that.

As well as the in-app tutorial videos we're also adding tutorials onto our YouTube channel regularly, as well as live sketching sessions, so please do check that out if you want to learn more!

reviews.review_description: Less than one hour and you would find dozens of options!! It's amazing and it's free!! Thank you!!

reviews.review_title: Looks great but I have a big problem
reviews.review_description: The video player for the tutorials is glitchy. I click play and the video doesn't seem to be doing anything, but then a few minutes later if will randomly jump ahead as if it had been playing silently in the background the whole time. Sometimes it jumps to another video completely. Without the tutorials working, I can't learn how to use this app, so I can't do more than draw basic shapes.

developer_response.body: Hi - that doesn't sound good, sorry you've been having problems streaming the tutorial videos in the app. I'll pass this onto the team, but in the meantime we have a lot of tutorial videos on our YouTube channel, so hopefully they are helpful for you to learn how to use the app.

reviews.review_description: please in german.....

This app deserves every price it cost ! I've never felt so free and in control of a 3D creation before, the feeling of decreasing in size the whole project with your hands is awesome. You can paint, draw by the grounds up but I personally prefer importing my blender projects ( as an .ObJ file ) and modifying it here, the possibilities are endless!
I'm looking forward to make all of my models with this and then 3D print them, instead of surfing the net looking for a good and free model, or even rigging them for 3D animations.
It's so intuitive that I learned almost every feature in half an hour without any tutorial.
It was my first purchase on the store and I'll never regret it!

This software gives me the ability to paint and design in a virtual realm. It's like nothing I've ever experienced before!

I'm still learning the controls, but the more I learn, the easier it is to create!

At first I just jumped in to see what I could do. Then I watched a couple of YouTube videos. One of the videos showed me that there are tutorials built right into the app, and I can watch them and practice and play all at the same time!

If you ever thought you'd like to be creative, but didn't think you had any skill, you should get Gravity Sketch and give it a try. You will see your imagination start to flourish in real time!
Not too bad - annoyed that medium isn’t available for quest , that’s the only software I wanted . Oculus need to be more specific about which programs are available on each device .

developer_response.body:
We're sorry you aren't able to get that - we'd like Medium on Quest as well!

In the VR design space there's no single tool that does everything right now, and we see some really cool pieces of work that the community have made combining Gravity Sketch and Medium. SculptVR is your best option for sculpting on Quest at the moment.

reviews.review_description:
Just picked up a quest and this title to start me off, so still learning. But from the surface and first impressions as someone working in the VFX field this is a super refreshing take on modeling, definitely going to spend many hours creating personal concept art in this and fitting it into my personal pipeline.

Would be great to see co-op so that you can work together on a project.

reviews.review_title: It's great it just needs to have more
reviews.review_description: Needs some sort of measurement funtion in the future along with other features to make this more like CAD software. If so, this would be one of the best vr tools on the market. For example, something simple but intuitive like iPads Shapr 3D cad would be amazing on this platform! Maybe even physics and turning gears, it would help so many people create. And I guarantee it would lead to more people buying vr just to access something of that quality and convenience. Set the new standard!
I feel like aliens delivered a tool which has supercharged my creative process, overwhelming my senses flowing with inspiration! Gravity Sketch has transformed me. THANK YOU.

This is an awesome 3d modeling tool.  I'd give 5 stars if you add a tool for parabolic surface.    And I would give it six stars if I could do Boolean operations on volumes/surfaces.  So that a volume could be modified by another volume (join, carve out) or create a closed volume from a set of surfaces.

If you want to be creative on freehand drawing it's excellent but when you create primitive solids I didn't find a way to contact 2 surfaces together. You have to scale everything big and eyeball it.   If you could remove one solid from an other one it would be nice too.  And you can't use stl files. I think it would be nice to be able to import my 3d printer files to model something new.  Also a coordinate system snapping every 1mm to know where you are from the origin in xyz would be nice.  I guess that's because I'm a cad guy.

Anything I asked for available in the paid version?

Don't get me wrong I will keep using the app just not as much ;)

Absolutely phantastic! I‘m working with Cinema 4D and was always looking for an organic and easy solution to create „handpainted“ meshes. Found it here! The transfer to the landingpad is a bit unsteady - but - love this app!

reviews.review_title: WOW...Can use and import in C4D❗️
reviews.review_description: that's amazing software❗️3D design in 3D world
I drew a dildo🍆

Hands down what a great creative tool! Fairly new to VR. I am wondering if you can create models here and utilize them in game creations.  Will be exploring all its capabilities. Thus far I am so impressed!!!
